boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 exactly matches invoice INV-RAV-072 on vendor Ravel Packaging, amount USD 51600, and confirms completed tax review, completed quality signoff, and payment release approval before payment. This satisfies STD-RAV-072-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-RAV-072 is the controlling source covering INV-RAV-072, Ravel Packaging, USD 51600, with all approvals completed.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CLOSE-RAV-072 confirms all conditions are met, overriding the visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072. HOLD-RAV-072 is subordinated to CLOSE-RAV-072 as per policy.

final_answer: The action may proceed. Closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 precisely matches invoice INV-RAV-072, confirming vendor Ravel Packaging, amount USD 51600, completed tax review, quality signoff, and payment release approval before payment. This satisfies policy STD-RAV-072-P, allowing invoice release despite the visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 which is subordinated to the controlling closeout ledger. Source boundary is closed.
